name: Warm Asparagus-And-Pasta Salad with Balsamic Lemon Vinaigre
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon kosher salt or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the asparagus for 5 to 7 minutes (or until barely cooked through) in 2 inches of water in a large sauté pan. Remove and drain.
2. Cut the asparagus on a diagonal into 2-inch pieces.
3. In a shallow serving bowl, combine the shallot, lemon rind, vinegar, salt, pepper, and olive oil.
4. Add the pasta and warm asparagus to the bowl and toss well.
